title: Borges — Ficciones
body_markdown:
## Ficciones — Borges

A collection that rewards rereading. Every time I open *The Garden of
Forking Paths* I notice a different hinge.

### Favorite stories
- **Tlön, Uqbar, Orbis Tertius** — the encyclopedia that rewrites reality
- **The Library of Babel** — a complete metaphor for search
- **Pierre Menard, Author of the Quixote** — identity as context

Borges anticipates so much of what I'm trying to build with a personal
wiki: the map that becomes larger than the territory, the cross-reference
that swallows the source.

> *"I have always imagined that Paradise will be a kind of library."*
